title: Metals Rally Amid Expectations Of Chinese Stimulus Measures
section_path: Metals Rally Amid Expectations Of Chinese Stimulus Measures
section_path_text: Metals Rally Amid Expectations Of Chinese Stimulus Measures
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Energy and metals jumped amid anticipation of Chinese stimulus. This was aided by a risk on tone across markets following a lower-than-expected inflation print in the US. Copper led the base metals higher after China cut its short-term policy interest rate.
